page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Bibliome Variant Database is a collection of variants mined from open-access primary literature. All variants included in the database have been mapped to the human genome and are presented in a manner ordered by genomic location. The goal of this database is to provide a searchable structured resource listing variant-containing references.
